info_plist_extra:
<key>NSAppTransportSecurity</key>
	<dict>
		<key>NSAllowsArbitraryLoads</key>
		<true/>
	</dict>
	<key>NSDesktopFolderUsageDescription</key>
	<string>vitraj needs access to your Desktop folder to browse and manage files.</string>
	<key>NSDocumentsFolderUsageDescription</key>
	<string>vitraj needs access to your Documents folder to browse and manage files.</string>
	<key>NSDownloadsFolderUsageDescription</key>
	<string>vitraj needs access to your Downloads folder to browse and manage files.</string>
	<key>NSRemovableVolumesUsageDescription</key>
	<string>vitraj needs access to removable volumes to browse and manage files.</string>
	<key>NSNetworkVolumesUsageDescription</key>
	<string>vitraj needs access to network volumes to browse and manage files.</string>
